overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai riding a horse through a misty forest at sunset, transitioning into the iconic Field of the Equinox Flowers—a vast meadow of red spider lilies bathed in golden hour light. The camera follows the character from behind as they travel from dense woodland into the open field.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest trail with atmospheric mist

agents.ego_description: samurai riding horseback at steady pace along winding forest path surrounded by tall pines

entered.detail: tall straight pine trunks forming dense woodland on both sides of path
reddish-brown dirt path winding through forest with visible hoof prints
low bushes and ferns lining the sides of the trail
ground-level fog drifting between trees catching golden light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense pine forest during golden hour, with the camera following a samurai on horseback along a dirt trail. Tall trees line both sides creating a semi-enclosed corridor, while mist patches drift across the path catching the warm backlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest edge transitioning to open flower meadow

events.description: exits tree line and enters vast field of red spider lilies

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride as environment opens from dense forest into expansive meadow

entered.detail: vast expanse of bright red flowers covering the ground in all directions
tree line visible on horizon marking edge of the meadow

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up as the rider emerges from the tree line into a wide meadow. The dense pines give way to an expansive field of red spider lilies stretching to the horizon, with the ground surface changing from dirt to grass covered in flowers.

scene_state.functional_zone: Field of the Equinox Flowers at sunset

events.description: game text 'FIELD OF THE EQUINOX FLOWERS' appears in lower right corner
camera turns to face bright setting sun creating strong silhouette and lens flare effect

agents.ego_description: riding through waist-high red flowers toward the setting sun on the horizon

entered.detail: bright golden sun low on horizon creating intense backlight and orange glow
traditional wooden post with lantern visible in the distance among the flowers
gentle slopes covered in red flowers extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The rider moves deeper into the vast Field of the Equinox Flowers, surrounded by dense red blooms. The setting sun dominates the left side of the frame creating a cinematic silhouette, while game text identifies the location. A distant wooden lantern post and rolling hills become visible through the mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed shadows of a misty pine forest into a vast, sun-drenched meadow of red flowers. It begins by trailing a samurai on horseback along a dirt path, where tall trees form a corridor and patches of mist catch the warm backlight of the golden hour. As the rider emerges from the tree line, the dense woodland gives way to an expansive field of red spider lilies that stretch toward the horizon, shifting the terrain from dirt to a floral carpet. The scene then opens further as the rider moves deeper into the blooms, with the setting sun creating a cinematic silhouette against the landscape. Finally, the view expands to reveal rolling hills and a distant wooden lantern post shimmering through the lingering mist.
